data.name: Msg_DocumentationOpenFailed
data.value: Failed to open the documentation. Please ensure a web browser is installed. Details: {0}

data.name: Msg_UpdateAvailablePrompt
data.value: A new version of Servy is available. Do you want to download it?

data.name: Msg_UpdateCheckTimeout
data.value: The update check timed out. Please try again later.

data.name: Msg_SecurityUncPathProhibited
data.value: Security Alert: Importing from UNC paths is prohibited to prevent malicious configuration injection.

data.name: Msg_SecurityNetworkDriveProhibited
data.value: Security Alert: Importing from network drives (including mapped UNC shares) is prohibited.

data.name: Msg_SecurityDirReparsePointProhibited
data.value: Security Alert: Importing configurations through directory junctions or symlinks is prohibited to prevent path redirection attacks.

data.name: Msg_SecurityFileReparsePointProhibited
data.value: Security Alert: Importing configurations through file symbolic links or junctions is prohibited to prevent path redirection attacks.

data.name: Msg_SecurityReservedDeviceName
data.value: Security Alert: '{0}' is a reserved Windows device name and cannot be used.

data.name: Msg_SecurityProtectedDirectory
data.value: Access Denied: The resolved path targets protected system directory '{0}'. Import prohibited.

data.name: Msg_SecurityInvalidFileType
data.value: Security Alert: Invalid file type '{0}'. Only .json and .xml files are supported.

data.name: Msg_SecurityResolvedUncDestination
data.value: Security Alert: Resolved file target points directly to a UNC destination. Import aborted.

data.name: Msg_SecurityHandleValidationFailed
data.value: Security Guard Failure: Target file handle validation rejected. {0}
